steps.title: Read the line of best fit at $x = 3$
steps.content: We're asked for the predicted body length at age 3 years, to the nearest 10 cm. Locate $x = 3$ on the horizontal axis and trace up to the line of best fit, then read the $y$-value.

steps.title: Round to the nearest 10
steps.content:
At age $x = 3$, the line passes through approximately $y \approx 100$ cm.

The answer is 100.
